title: May 10
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 10''' is the 130th day of the year (131st in leap years). There are 235 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1929|1929]] – [[George Coe]] is born.
*[[1930s#1932|1932]] – [[Alec Mills]] is born.
*[[1930s#1937|1937]] – [[Jonathan Hales]] is born.
*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[David Clennon]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Scott Hanna]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 2|''Star Wars'' (1977) 2]] published. The cover date is August.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 14|''Star Wars Weekly'' 14]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 151|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 151]] published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Incredible Cross-Sections]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars Insider 49|''Star Wars Insider'' 49]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – [[Star Wars: Honor and Duty (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Republic: Honor and Duty'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[The Screaming Citadel 1|''The Screaming Citadel'' 1]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 31|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 31]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Luke vs. Jabba - Sail Barge Escape]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2021]] – [[Tony Armatrading]] dies.
*[[2022]] – [[Brotherhood (novel)|''Brotherhood'']] published.
*2022 – [[Brotherhood (audiobook)|''Brotherhood'' audiobook]] released.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars by Jason Aaron Omnibus]]'' second printing published.
*2022 – ''[[Leia, Princess of Alderaan, Vol. 2]]'' published in the United States.
*[[2023]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 34|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 34]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic (2022) 9|''The High Republic'' (2022) 9]] published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[The Simpsons: May the 12th Be With You]]'' premieres on Disney+.
<noinclude>
